---
title: "M^c^Cool News: 04 Feb 1990"
mainfont: Courier Prime
---

__THE HEADLINES AT 1400 ON SUNDAY 4TH FEBRUARY 1990__

Due to the new year’s earthquake a new entrance to the DOT, Domain of Tartarus opened up near the town of Warboys. 
The entrance was unknown until yesterday when Raiders from the DOT attacked and pillaged the village. 
The military are now on the scene.

Kraken is opening up a controversial new oil pipeline that travels through the Black forest in Germany. The eco warrior/terrorist group, The Arrows of Gaia, also known as TAG, had publicly marked the project with their famous slogan “TAG, you’re it”. However, nothing appeared to come of their threat.


{CONTINUE THIS}
